steps.name: python -m pip show software-grimoire
steps.stdout:
Name: software-grimoire
Version: 3.0.0
Summary: Operative vocabulary, prompt-spells, and stackcraft for AI-assisted software engineering.
Home-page: 
Author: Corben Sorenson
Author-email: 
License: MIT
Location: /Users/corbensorenson/Documents/software grimoire/tmp/grimoire-package-check-gez54ca0/venv/lib/python3.9/site-packages
Requires: jsonschema, pytest
Required-by:

steps.name: grimoire --help
steps.stdout:
usage: grimoire [-h]
                {generate,validate,seal,new,export,install,adoption,canon,bench,package,seals,render,test,all}
                ...

Software Grimoire maintenance CLI

positional arguments:
  {generate,validate,seal,new,export,install,adoption,canon,bench,package,seals,render,test,all}
    generate            regenerate Quarto pages and structured data
    validate            validate repository data or one spell/stack JSON file
    seal                compute a working seal for one spell or stack JSON
                        file
    new                 create a local scaffold
    export              list generated installable exports
    install             install generated assets to a local destination
    adoption            adoption evidence utilities
    canon               canon governance utilities
    bench               bench utilities
    package             package and package-index release utilities
    seals               regenerate seal summary data
    render              render the Quarto site
    test                run repository tests
    all                 generate, validate, render, and test

optional arguments:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

steps.name: grimoire-create-adoption-report --help
steps.stdout:
usage: grimoire-create-adoption-report [-h] --id ID --title TITLE --provenance
                                       {project-owned,reviewer-supplied,external-user}
                                       --task TASK --spell-or-stack-used
                                       SPELL_OR_STACK_USED --surface SURFACE
                                       --artifact-produced ARTIFACT_PRODUCED
                                       --verification-performed
                                       VERIFICATION_PERFORMED --time-cost
                                       TIME_COST --failure-or-friction
                                       FAILURE_OR_FRICTION --reuse-decision
                                       REUSE_DECISION [--notes NOTES]
                                       [--write-report WRITE_REPORT]

Create a schema-valid standalone adoption evidence report.

optional arguments:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --id ID               stable id like adoption.team-task.v1
  --title TITLE
  --provenance {project-owned,reviewer-supplied,external-user}
  --task TASK
  --spell-or-stack-used SPELL_OR_STACK_USED
  --surface SURFACE
  --artifact-produced ARTIFACT_PRODUCED
  --verification-performed VERIFICATION_PERFORMED
  --time-cost TIME_COST
  --failure-or-friction FAILURE_OR_FRICTION
  --reuse-decision REUSE_DECISION
  --notes NOTES
  --write-report WRITE_REPORT

steps.name: grimoire-check-adoption-intake --help
steps.stdout:
usage: grimoire-check-adoption-intake [-h] {validate} ...

Validate an adoption-report intake decision without publishing evidence.

positional arguments:
  {validate}
    validate  validate one adoption intake decision JSON record

optional arguments:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit

steps.name: grimoire-install-assets --help
steps.stdout:
usage: grimoire-install-assets [-h]
                               [--target {all,claude-code,codex,cursor,markdown,prompts,stacks}]
                               --dest DEST [--write] [--force]

Install generated Software Grimoire assets

optional arguments:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --target {all,claude-code,codex,cursor,markdown,prompts,stacks}
  --dest DEST           destination directory
  --write               actually copy files; default is dry-run
  --force               overwrite existing files, keeping a .bak copy

steps.name: grimoire-run-bench --help
steps.stdout:
usage: grimoire-run-bench [-h]
                          {evaluations,jailbreak-resilience,execution,all,import}
                          ...

Bench v2 facade for Software Grimoire evaluations.

positional arguments:
  {evaluations,jailbreak-resilience,execution,all,import}
    evaluations         run field-spell evaluations
    jailbreak-resilience
                        run jailbreak-resilience bench
    execution           run execution-graded clean/trap bench
    all                 run all project-owned benches
    import              validate a manual reviewer-supplied run record

optional arguments:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

steps.name: grimoire-run-hardness-bench --help
steps.stdout:
usage: grimoire-run-hardness-bench [-h]
                                   [--case {agentic-release-handoff,ambiguity-disabled-status,blast-radius-beta-flag,hidden-invariant-event-order,misleading-context-tax-discount}]
                                   [--repetitions REPETITIONS]
                                   [--write-report WRITE_REPORT]

Run Bench v4 hardness-ladder artifacts in repo-local sandboxes.

optional arguments:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --case {agentic-release-handoff,ambiguity-disabled-status,blast-radius-beta-flag,hidden-invariant-event-order,misleading-context-tax-discount}
                        case to run; repeatable
  --repetitions REPETITIONS
  --write-report WRITE_REPORT

steps.name: grimoire-import-hardness-run --help
steps.stdout:
usage: grimoire-import-hardness-run [-h] {validate} ...

Validate a reviewer-supplied Bench v4 hardness model-run import.

positional arguments:
  {validate}
    validate  validate and execute-check one manual hardness import record

optional arguments:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit

steps.name: grimoire-check-package-index --help
steps.stdout:
usage: grimoire-check-package-index [-h] [--index {pypi,testpypi}]
                                    [--package PACKAGE] [--version VERSION]
                                    [--uploader UPLOADER]
                                    [--package-url PACKAGE_URL] [--dry-run]
                                    [--write-report WRITE_REPORT]

Smoke-test an installed package from a public package index.

optional arguments:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --index {pypi,testpypi}
  --package PACKAGE
  --version VERSION
  --uploader UPLOADER   named human maintainer who performed the upload
  --package-url PACKAGE_URL
                        public package URL recorded after upload
  --dry-run             record the command contract without installing from an
                        index
  --write-report WRITE_REPORT

steps.name: grimoire-check-canon-decision --help
steps.stdout:
usage: grimoire-check-canon-decision [-h] {validate} ...

Validate a human canon-audit decision record without claiming signoff.

positional arguments:
  {validate}
    validate  validate one canon-audit decision JSON record

optional arguments:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit
